rationale: Keep: the two papers are methodologically close, with both titles and notes centered on bilinear models and simultaneous segmentation (citing: latent-class bilinear multinomial logit with respondent/item segments; cited: clusterwise bilinear MDS for simultaneous segmentation/positioning). The cited note also positions itself against latent-class MDS, which is plausibly relevant to the citing paper’s mixture-based modeling framework. Given this likely methodological linkage, it is not an obvious incidental mention.
